_comment: Task Graph Template — Generated by 01/autonomous-orchestrator. Represents the parallel task decomposition for a product build. Each node is an independent work unit that can be assigned to a child agent. Edges represent dependencies.
_usage: Copy this template, populate nodes from the project brief, then the orchestrator assigns agents to ready nodes (those with all dependencies satisfied).

nodes.name: Project Scaffold
nodes.description: Initialize repo, wrangler.toml, package.json, tsconfig, directory structure

nodes.name: Homepage Build
nodes.description: Hero section, navigation, footer, responsive at all 6 breakpoints

nodes.name: Database Schema
nodes.description: D1 schema design, Drizzle ORM setup, initial migrations
nodes.acceptance: Migrations run cleanly, seed data insertable

nodes.name: Authentication Integration
nodes.description: Clerk setup, sign-in/sign-up flows, protected routes, webhook handler
nodes.acceptance: Sign up, sign in, sign out all work, webhook syncs user to D1

nodes.name: Core API Endpoints
nodes.description: CRUD endpoints for primary entities, Zod validation, error handling
nodes.acceptance: All endpoints return correct data, validation rejects bad input

nodes.name: Stripe Integration
nodes.description: Products, prices, checkout session, webhook handler, customer portal
nodes.acceptance: Test card checkout succeeds, webhook processes payment_intent.succeeded

nodes.name: SEO & Meta Tags
nodes.description: Title, meta desc, OG tags, JSON-LD, sitemap, robots.txt on all pages
nodes.acceptance: Lighthouse SEO >= 90, all pages have unique titles and descriptions

nodes.name: E2E Test Suite
nodes.description: Playwright tests for homepage, auth flow, payment flow, all breakpoints
nodes.acceptance: All tests green on production URL

nodes.name: Visual Polish & Motion
nodes.description: Animations, transitions, loading states, error pages, Easter egg
nodes.acceptance: GPT-4o visual critique finds zero issues

nodes.name: Launch Sequence
nodes.description: Final deploy, cache purge, sitemap submission, social announce, monitoring
nodes.acceptance: Production live, sitemap submitted, social posted, uptime monitoring active

parallel_groups._comment: Nodes that can execute simultaneously. The orchestrator picks the next group when all dependencies are met.

agent_assignments._comment: Maps agent IDs to their assigned nodes. Updated at runtime by the orchestrator.
